description: PAReviewCopilot.HostedAgent observability workbook (Stream D.2). Wired by tools/deploy_data_agents.py when APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING is set; service.name='PAReviewCopilot' filters the queries.

content.json:
# PAReviewCopilot.HostedAgent
UM-reviewer PA decision support. **Adjudication-adjacent, not adjudicative** — the recommendation enum is locked to `prepare_approval`, `prepare_denial_for_md_review`, `request_more_info`, `escalate_to_md`.

Governance: phi_minimization=required, decision_authority=deny (Copilot does NOT close cases), audit_log=required. CMS-0057-F policy pointers required on approve/deny envelopes.

content.query: requests | where cloud_RoleName == 'PAReviewCopilot' | summarize Invocations = count(), P50_ms = percentile(duration, 50), P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), P99_ms = percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart
content.title: Invocations & latency (p50/p95/p99)

content.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName == 'PAReviewCopilot' and name in ('get_pa_packet','lookup_policy_citation','ask_um_agent','ask_risk_agent') | summarize Calls = count(), Failures = countif(success == false), SuccessRate = round(100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), 2) by name | order by Calls desc
content.title: Tool-call success rate (4 tools)

content.query: customEvents | where cloud_RoleName == 'PAReviewCopilot' and name == 'agent_response' | extend recommendation = tostring(customDimensions.recommendation) | summarize Count = count() by recommendation | order by Count desc
content.title: Recommendation mix (approval / RMI / deny-for-MD / escalate)

content.query: customEvents | where cloud_RoleName == 'PAReviewCopilot' and name == 'agent_response' | extend recommendation = tostring(customDimensions.recommendation), citations = tostring(customDimensions.regulatory_pointers) | where recommendation in ('prepare_approval','prepare_denial_for_md_review') | summarize Total = count(), MissingCMS0057F = countif(citations !has 'CMS-0057-F') by bin(timestamp, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: CMS-0057-F citation discipline (must be attached to approve/deny)

content.query: exceptions | where cloud_RoleName == 'PAReviewCopilot' | summarize Errors = count() by type, outerMessage | top 20 by Errors desc
content.title: Top 20 errors
